title: tabebuia heterophylla subsp. pallida
intro: Tabebuia heterophylla subsp. pallida, also known as the "pink poui," is a plant species within the family Bignoniaceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Tabebuia heterophylla subsp. pallida include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the plant's leaves, bark, and flowers.
